meta.description: Reusable preview fixture definitions for visual QA across themes

desktop-shell.label: Desktop Shell
desktop-shell.description: Main desktop frame with title bar, nav rail, content panel, and footer status

settings-panel.label: Settings Panel
settings-panel.description: Structured settings form with section headings, inputs, switches, and save/cancel actions

plugin-card-gallery.label: Plugin Card Gallery
plugin-card-gallery.description: Plugin tiles with icon, title, metadata, status badge, and action buttons

modal-dialog.label: Modal Dialog
modal-dialog.description: Modal with heading, body, inline validation, and primary/secondary actions

notification-stack.label: Notification Stack
notification-stack.description: Toast, banner, and inline message variants with info/success/warning/error states

table-dashboard.label: Table Dashboard
table-dashboard.description: Dense telemetry table with tabs, filters, rows, and summary cards
